com.mentor.chs.plugin.modifier

Interface IXModifier

  • All Known Subinterfaces:
    IXLibraryModificationHistoryProvider<O>

    @NotToBeImplementedDirectly
public interface IXModifier
    All custom modifiers will implement this interface. You should not implement this class directly. You should implement one of its children, for example, IXLibraryModificationHistoryProvider. Object modifier plugin (IXObjectModifierPlugin) implementer will return a set of modifier objects which will be processed by the application
    See Also:
    IXLibraryModificationHistoryProvider, IXObjectModifierPlugin
